defmodule Doubler do
  def double(n), do: n * 2
end

defmodule Parity do
  def even?(n), do: rem(n, 2) == 0
end

defmodule Sums do
  def sum_list([]), do: 0
  def sum_list([h | t]), do: h + sum_list(t)
end

defmodule Rev do
  def reverse(l), do: do_rev(l, [])
  defp do_rev([], acc), do: acc
  defp do_rev([h | t], acc), do: do_rev(t, [h | acc])
end

defmodule Vowels do
  def count(s) do
    s |> String.graphemes() |> Enum.count(&(&1 in ~w(a e i o u)))
  end
end

defmodule Str do
  def shout(s), do: String.upcase(s) <> "!"
end

defmodule Fib do
  def fib(0), do: 0
  def fib(1), do: 1
  def fib(n), do: fib(n - 1) + fib(n - 2)
end

defmodule Calc do
  def square(n), do: n * n
end

defmodule Tax do
  def add_vat(price) do
    price * 1.2
  end
end

defmodule Area do
  def circle(r), do: 3.14159 * r * r
end
